shared_findings_used: distribution_lane_latest.json: curator_outreach is the active replacement lane while Codeberg adoption is flat

why_this_action.reasoning: GitHub auth is unavailable from this environment, so the strongest legitimate same-run path for this prepared curator target was public email outreach through Taskade's published support/contact surface.
